events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario: Form build & bracing, industrial site, observed field condition: blowout evidence. Work rough-complete. Reference ACI 347. Treat as roughly 70 percent complete until defects corrected. Need decision fail because dangerous/non-compliant? Blowout evidence indicates concrete form blowout, serious safety/structural defect. Component conditions installed-defective. Percent complete maybe 70. Risk high or critical? Blowout evidence could be critical due to imminent collapse hazard. But maybe high. Need decide. The prompt says if work is dangerous or non-compliant, decision must be fail. Blowout evidence is dangerous. Risk critical maybe. Work stage rough-complete. Findings: evidence of form blowout/breach, loss of concrete, compromised formwork bracing, non-compliance with ACI 347. Actions: immediate stop-work, secure area, inspect/replace damaged forms/bracing, clean/repair, re-engineer if needed, re-inspect before pour/continue. Rationale. References ACI 347. Need include all fields. Use empty arrays for order, workable, sound_source irrelevant. event_time 0, rate 0, value 0. confidence high 0.9. percent_complete 70. component_conditions ["installed-defective","non-compliant","failed"] maybe failed. The allowed list includes installed-defective, non-compliant, worn, degraded, failed. Blowout evidence could be failed. Include installed-defective and failed, non-compliant. But component condition categories that may apply: installed-defective. We can also include non-compliant and failed. Need ensure valid JSON.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": [
    "installed-defective",
    "non-compliant",
    "failed"
  ],
  "percent_complete": 70,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.9,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Visible evidence of a form blowout/breach in the formwork assembly",
    "Loss of concrete containment indicates inadequate form strength or bracing",
    "Existing bracing and ties likely undersized, missing, or improperly installed for the imposed loads",
    "Condition violates ACI 347 requirements for formwork design, construction, and safety"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately and secure the area around the affected formwork",
    "Have a competent person/engineer inspect the blowout and adjacent forms",
    "Remove and replace damaged form panels, ties, walers, and bracing",
    "Re-evaluate formwork design and bracing layout against actual concrete pressures before resuming",
    "Clean up spilled concrete and debris, repair any affected embeds or reinforcement",
    "Re-inspect and obtain approval before next pour or close-out"
  ],
  "rationale": "Blowout evidence is a serious structural and safety failure of the formwork/bracing system. Under ACI 347, formwork must be capable of supporting all imposed loads without failure. Because the work is dangerous and non-compliant, it fails assessment and must be repaired before progress can be recognized.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 347"
  ]
}
